title: NametagPlus
description: This mod customizes player nametags in-game, enhancing visibility and readability.
body:
**This mod customizes player nametags in-game, enhancing visibility and readability. It displays:**

- Player names with formatting preserved, now rendered with a subtle shadow for better contrast.
  
- Current health and absorption (yellow for extra hearts). Color-coded health: green → yellow → orange → red depending on health level.

- Show your Nametags, remain visible in all perspectives.
